title: Background Job Queue with Retry
instruction: Plan the implementation of a background job system for a NestJS application. Jobs should be queued via Bull (backed by Redis), support at-least-once delivery with configurable retry (max 3 attempts, exponential backoff), emit events on completion/failure, and expose a REST endpoint to query job status. Jobs needed immediately: send-email, generate-report, sync-inventory.
codebase_context:
```
# NestJS monolith, TypeScript strict mode
src/
  app.module.ts
  users/
    users.module.ts
    users.service.ts
  orders/
    orders.module.ts
    orders.service.ts
  email/
    email.service.ts   # currently sends synchronously via nodemailer
package.json  # nestjs, bull, ioredis, nodemailer already listed
```
